title: ゴルシと一緒に平和を守れ！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm walking through the park on my day off. It's so peaceful today...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hit the deck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I flinch instinctively at the sound of Gold Ship's voice.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You there! Don't just stand around—trouble's coming! Danger!
Danger!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Darn, we can't stop now. This whole place is about to blow...

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Cap'n Golshi, our advance is halted! Permission to return to jungle
gym base!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: Wait, we'd have to cross the hot lava sandbox to get back!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Just follow me! You too, Trainer! When we're backed into a lava
corner, my Goldy-Gold Kenpo can blast a way through!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's nice to see Gold Ship playing with the kids, but she's roped me
into the game now...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Watch it, Trainer! That's a lava zone! Your goose almost got roasted!
choice_data_list: Sorry, I don't know the rules...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're missing all of the heavenly glory! Don't think, feeeel! My
trainer should know better!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Let's do this, guys! Move ahead, I'll handle the rear!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'll lead you all to victory... Cool, huh?

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Wooow! You're the greatest, Cap'n Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship heroically leads the children and me across the vast
sandbox. But then...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Gaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: C-Cap'n Golshi?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship has suddenly collapsed in the sand!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Urk, looks like this is it for me... We were almost home free, but they
got me...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Listen, you've got to go on without me... You have to... live! ...Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: No... Please wake up, Cap'n Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The scene of the crime was locked down, and no murder weapon
found. Every single suspect has an alibi...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
With nothing to go on, this case might go cold. But don't you worry!
Crime never escapes the great Sherlock Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Boys
text_block_list.text: It's really her! Sherlock Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Hmm! Hmmm?! My bedazzling brain cells of a 5,640,000 IQ
have just burst into action!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: The offender who shot me was... You, ya dirty ol' rotten jerk head!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's pointing at me! What should I do...

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: You gotta say somethin' back or you'll lose!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah! You're Golshi's trainer for a reason. Do something funny!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get it... I can't let her steer the ship all the time. I need to be like
these kids and go with the flow!
choice_data_list: You caught me! But I'll have the last laugh!
You caught me! But I'll have the last laugh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Agh, so this is your true form! Those thirty purple tentacles sprouting
from your head prove it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But what now? I can't take on this villain in my current form! Everyone,
retreat!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... wheeze... How did you follow me all the way here?

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: What now... We're cornered!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hmph, like I have any money... But I do have this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I am the great Umamusume goddess, Golshaea. I see kind hearts in
need of aid and bestow unto you my power.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: It's Golshaea. She only grants 100 miracles a year!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can feel it! You all sense it too, don't you? It's the power of the
goddess!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it's true! We can win this time!
choice_data_list:
What have you done? Curse your goddess
power!

What have you done? Curse your goddess
power!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It's flowing through us! Our combined power level is over 5,640,000!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You'll never complete your evil plan, villain! Prepare to taste... the
Golshi Revenginator!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Collapse!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Justice has been... served!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: You did it! You're the awesomest, Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another day where I'm not really sure what happened... But it was
surprisingly fun to go along with Gold Ship's goofy games.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Woooo! We pulled through okay!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We protected the park, caught the criminal, turned me into a god, and achieved world peace!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention the flowers bloomed, the trees grew lush, and the
birds sang beautifully! I even impress myself!
choice_data_list: Plus those kids sure had a lot of fun.
Plus those kids sure had a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
How could they not? I don't ever let boredom strike, even for a split
second!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: And you know, you weren't too bad at it yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think I got a little better at keeping up with Gold Ship today!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I just remembered. I should finish those Nazca lines I started drawing
in the school garden!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You should come with! Meet in three secs! Bye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...It might be a while longer until I can fully keep up though.
